content.en:
"Originally, my strength was still weaker than the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, but now that I have comprehended the Supreme Dao Rules, my strength is directly comparable to the average Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And this is just the beginning, when he makes more use of the rules of the Supreme Dao, and even creates corresponding moves, his strength will skyrocket.

And these fragments have not been exhausted yet, Ye Tian is ready to continue to comprehend, so that the realm of the Supreme Dao Rules will slowly ascend.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the rules of the Dao.

Time flies.

After Ye Tian comprehended the rules of the Dao, he comprehended these fragments, and the consumption of the power of the fragment rules was too many times faster.

It is estimated that tens of millions of primeval years will be consumed by him.

Time flies, and more than 30 million primeval years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already consumed all the fragments, and although the rules of the Supreme Dao had improved a little, they were still superficial.

This shows how difficult it is to elevate to the rules of the Dao.

"Next, use the rules of the Supreme Dao to create a supernatural power, combine it with the supreme supernatural power of reincarnation, and fuse it into it, if you can create a supernatural power that is more powerful than the supreme supernatural power of reincarnation, it will be enough!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to create like this.

And I have to admit that if you want to use the rules of the Supreme Dao to create something, it is very dangerous in the process of creation, and if you are not careful, your body will crack or even fall.

Compared to the Supreme Dao rules, Ye Tian's current realm was still too low.

And as time passed, Ye Tian found that the Supreme Dao Rules were too majestic, and even the origin of the Eternal Land could not suppress the Supreme Dao Rules.

And the more I studied the rules of the Dao, the more I realized that I was too small.

He even had a feeling that if he wanted to transcend the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, he had to master the Supreme Dao rules.

"The Origin Ancestor and the Ancestor failed to break through, perhaps because they didn't master the rules of the Supreme Dao!!"

Ye Tian guessed.

But if the Origin Ancestor broke the barrier and brought those fragments in, he would not be able to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao.

Therefore, he is now able to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, and he really has to thank the Origin Ancestor.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

Ye Tian gradually created a supernatural power of the same grade as the supreme rules of reincarnation, but because it was created according to the supreme rules, it was more powerful.

He could feel that this supernatural power was spicy and imperfect, but it was the limit of what he could create at the moment.

The main reason is that he doesn't understand the rules of the Supreme Dao at all, and the realm of comprehension is only scratching the surface, so naturally he can't create more powerful supernatural powers.

However, Ye Tian was also satisfied for the time being.

The supernatural power he created is called the Heavenly Poke, which has incomparably terrifying penetration and lethality, much more powerful than the Ruin Sky Spear, and consumes a lot less.

It is estimated that the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Nine Awakenings will not be able to block the Heavenly Poke and will penetrate his body.

It can be said that after creating the Zhitian Poke, Ye Tian had the strength and confidence to kill the weaker Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Of course.

At present, he has only created a supernatural power involving the rules of the Supreme Dao, and if he creates a few more, his strength will increase.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to create such supernatural powers, and after countless researches, according to the reincarnation flow body technique, this reincarnation supreme divine power was transformed into the supreme path flow body technique, making his speed faster.

At the same time, he also transformed the reincarnation vajra body into the supreme path vajra body, and his defense became stronger.

In this way, Ye Tian's strength naturally soared.

"With my current strength, it is estimated that it is equivalent to a relatively powerful Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, but among the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, it is definitely not the top, not to mention that compared with the original Origin Ancestor, I still have to improve my cultivation!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And cultivation requires a lot of resources to improve, he did grab a lot of resources in the reincarnation Ziyuan last time, but in order to impact the sixth balance realm, he spent too much, and now he has almost exhausted his resources in the sixth balance realm.

The remaining resources were not enough to raise his cultivation to the limit of the sixth balance.

Of course, if he used it sparingly, relying on the long years of slow penance, and taking trillions of primeval era years as a unit, he could naturally rise to the limit of the sixth balance and impact the seventh balance.

But he didn't want to wait that long, so he naturally needed to look for more good things.

"I still have to go to the reincarnation of Ziyuan!"

Ye Tian decided.

Reincarnation Ziyuan is one of the treasures with the most resources in the reincarnation dark domain, even if he takes away many resources, he will still give birth to many resources, many of which are eaten and refined by the creatures of the reincarnation Ziyuan.

Moreover, the most core area, he hadn't entered it last time, if he went in, he could still grab a lot of top-level resources, which would be helpful for his real body replication.

Besides, with the cultivation of his true body copying his body, he can enter the reincarnation purple abyss.

After all, in terms of realm, he is equivalent to the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Six Awakenings, and naturally he will not be restricted by the rules of the reincarnation purple abyss.

The strength of the true body replicating body is comparable to the more powerful Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and they are naturally not afraid of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord creatures in the depths of the core of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss.

......

Reincarnation Dark Domain.

Ye Tian's Ao Chen copied his body and prepared to enter the reincarnation purple abyss again, and now the reincarnation purple abyss has calmed down.

In addition, Ye Tian said that he only roamed around the periphery, so he would naturally not be restricted.

Soon.

He entered the reincarnation purple abyss again.

It's still the cave last time, where Ye Tian copied his real body and copied his body.

Nowadays, the cultivation of the real body copy body is at a higher level, and the combat power is naturally stronger.

It didn't take long for a real body to be copied out.

"It's time to enter the core area of the reincarnation purple abyss!"

Ye Tian decided.

He prepared several replica bodies to go over together, and wanted to kill his duplicate bodies, unless it was the top Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, but the Reincarnation Purple Abyss should not have such a creature, otherwise he would have rushed out of the Reincarnation Purple Abyss, and he would not have been suppressed here for countless years, and he would not be able to get out of here.

Reincarnation of the core area of the Purple Abyss.

The territory of the Manta Monty Python.

At this time, it was sleeping as usual, it was the overlord of the Ninth Awakening Origin Upper Realm, and when it reached its realm, it was difficult to continue to improve its strength, and most of the time it was naturally used to sleep.

Suddenly.

It senses the breath of an outsider.

Rumble!!!!

The Manta python woke up and stared into the distance: "Outsiders who dare to break into here are simply looking for death!"
